title: France Strikes Hydrogen Gold: Worldâ€™s Largest Hydrogen Reserve Worth $92 Billion
content: France discovered the world's largest reserve of 46 million tons of natural hydrogen worth $92 billion that could reshape the world's clean energy industry, as per a report. French scientists have found the natural hydrogen below the soil in Folschviller, a region in the Moselle department, according to Interesting Engineering. This discovery has the potential to transform the global energy market by providing a new source of carbon-free fuel and putting France at the pinnacle of the global energy revolution, as per the report.
author: Analysts Account
